sections.paragraph:
ἀντιβλέπω (s. βλέπω; Pherecr. Fgm. 20D [V a.d.]; X. et al.; Mitt-Wilck. I/2, 38, 27 Stud. Pal. V, 52 I, 27 [III a.d.]; PGM 5, 323; Jos., Ant. 6, 10, C. Ap. 2, 235) look (straight) at πρός τινα (cp. Plut., Pomp. 656 [69, 5]; Aelian, NA 3, 33) someone ApcPt 3:6.

Pherecr Pherecr , s. Com.; V b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et et al. = et alii (and others)

Mitt-Wilck. Mitt-Wilck. = LMitteis/UWilcken, Grundzüge und Chrestomathie der Papyruskunde—Lists 4, 6

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 88
